news.title:
Nomura retains Buy on FSN E-Commerce with ₹305 target, citing strong FY26 revenue growth and late-20s BPC growth.
Fashion growth acceleration in late-30s, ~7.6% EBITDA margin, and 4.6x EV/Sales valuation add to investment appeal.
news.summary:
Nomura retains Buy on FSN E-Commerce with ₹305 target, citing strong FY26 revenue growth and late-20s BPC growth.
Fashion growth acceleration in late-30s, ~7.6% EBITDA margin, and 4.6x EV/Sales valuation add to investment appeal.

news.title:
Macquarie retains Underperform on FSN E-Commerce with ₹210 target, citing in-line beauty and better fashion growth.
Expectations include late-twenties GMV/revenue growth, flat beauty EBITDA margins, and sequentially moderating fashion losses.
news.summary:
Macquarie retains Underperform on FSN E-Commerce with ₹210 target, citing in-line beauty and better fashion growth.
Expectations include late-twenties GMV/revenue growth, flat beauty EBITDA margins, and sequentially moderating fashion losses.

news.title:
Experts recommend 6 stocks for the short term, including Axis Bank, Nykaa, Coal India, Wipro, Trent, and CCL Products.
Key targets: Axis Bank (₹1,343-1,365), Nykaa (₹275-282), Coal India (₹500), Wipro (₹220), Trent (₹4,100), CCL (₹1,210-1,240).
news.summary:
Experts recommend 6 stocks for the short term, including Axis Bank, Nykaa, Coal India, Wipro, Trent, and CCL Products.
Key targets: Axis Bank (₹1,343-1,365), Nykaa (₹275-282), Coal India (₹500), Wipro (₹220), Trent (₹4,100), CCL (₹1,210-1,240).

news.title:
FSN E-Commerce Ventures explores strategic growth opportunities, including discussions with a skincare brand.
The company confirms no pending legal or regulatory issues and will disclose updates as required.
news.summary:
FSN E-Commerce Ventures explores strategic growth opportunities, including discussions with a skincare brand.

news.title:
Nykaa shares rose 4% on Q4 update and potential acquisition of Deepika Padukone's skincare brand 82 E.
Analyst sees strong momentum; stock above 200 DMA, likely to hit ₹280-₹300 medium term, with dips advised for accumulation.
news.summary:
Nykaa shares rose 4% on Q4 update and potential acquisition of Deepika Padukone's skincare brand 82 E.
Analyst sees strong momentum; stock above 200 DMA, likely to hit ₹280-₹300 medium term, with dips advised for accumulation.

news.title:
Nykaa shares rose 4% after projecting late twenties net revenue growth in Q4.
Nykaa opened 26 new stores, boosting total count to 313 by March 2026.
news.summary:
Nykaa shares rose 4% after projecting late twenties net revenue growth in Q4.
Nykaa opened 26 new stores, boosting total count to 313 by March 2026.

news.title:
Nykaa projects Q4 GMV growth in high 20s, NSV in low 30s.
FY26 NSV growth expected in high 20s; 26 new stores added in Q4.
news.summary:
Nykaa projects Q4 GMV growth in high 20s, NSV in low 30s.

news.title:
Nykaa Fashion under FSN E-Commerce shows steady growth with GMV, NSV rising.
Growth expected to accelerate in Q4 FY2026 with GMV in high-20s, NSV in early-40s.
news.summary:

news.title:
FSN E-Commerce Ventures reports late 20s YoY GMV growth in Q4 FY26.
Net revenue growth hits late 20s YoY, highest in 12 quarters; retail expands.
news.summary:
FSN E-Commerce Ventures reports late 20s YoY GMV growth in Q4 FY26.

news.title:
Nykaa, owned by FSN E-Commerce Ventures, seeks majority stake in 82°E.
The acquisition aims to strengthen Nykaa's portfolio amid rising market competition.

news.title:
Nykaa's FY26 BPC growth sees 69% YoY rise in own brands but core BPC under 20%.
Fashion segment shows improved EBITDAM, but high valuations and profitability challenges persist; SELL rating with ₹205 target.
news.summary:
Nykaa's FY26 BPC growth sees 69% YoY rise in own brands but core BPC under 20%.
Fashion segment shows improved EBITDAM, but high valuations and profitability challenges persist; SELL rating with ₹205 target.

Previous target price was Rs 150, now raised to Rs 210.
news.summary:

news.title:
FSN E-Commerce Ventures' weight to rise by $28M (Rs 2.5B) in MSCI rejig.
The MSCI February rejig takes effect today at 3 PM.

This deal enhances Nykaa's decade-long association with the French beauty giant.
